steps.title: Use the total collection
steps.content: The probability of selecting an igneous rock is the number of igneous rocks divided by the total number of rocks in the collection. The table shows $10$ igneous rocks, and the question says there are $70$ rocks total.

steps.title: Write the probability
steps.content: Use the total collection in the denominator, not just another rock type or the non-igneous rocks. That gives: $$P(\text{igneous})=\frac{10}{70}$$ The answer is D.
